summary: Added machine-readable part-family source registry and reference-key wiring in radar config.
notes: Historical best-effort reconstruction from available workspace state.

summary: Implemented initial diode builder/decoder around specific part-number keys.
notes: Later superseded by series-level diode hierarchy.

summary: Refactored diode model to datasheet-series hierarchy: series -> device type -> suffix controls; updated splash/config/decoders.
notes: No backward-compatibility aliases retained for old diode keys by request.

summary: Bootstrapped engineering log files and added explicit AI bot logging instructions.
notes: Append-only log protocol established for future agent updates.

summary: Expanded diode pill labels with explicit selection meaning across series, device, quality, tolerance, package, bond, and compliance options.
notes: No decode keys changed; label/detail text only for clearer operator selection context.

summary: Renamed engineering_log files to agents_log and made per-file edit statements mandatory for new agent entries.

edits: Repointed workflow logging paths from engineering_log.* to agents_log.*.
Added requirement that every new log record includes per-file edit statements.
Renamed log title and source-of-truth filename references to agents_log.*.
Added required JSONL field `file_edits` and protocol rule making it mandatory for new records.
Added historical note that older records may not include `file_edits`.
Recorded this migration as a new append-only process entry with `file_edits` populated.

notes: Historical entries were preserved unchanged to maintain append-only history integrity.

summary: Redid diode family details with datasheet-specific unique selectors per device code and tightened device-aware quality-prefix validation.

edits: Replaced generic diode device pill labels with datasheet-derived electrical discriminators (VZ nominal for 1N4099-1N4135/1N4614-1N4627, VBR/VRWM split for 1N6638/1N6642/1N6643, VRWM split for 1N6675/1N6676/1N6677).
Added series/device-aware diode quality option logic so invalid quality prefixes are rejected and missing required prefixes are explicitly flagged.
Updated diode decode output to display device-specific decoded meaning from the selected datasheet series and improved quality-prefix error messaging.
Updated diode reference-db document notes to explicitly call out the unique parameter each device code controls.
Appended a new entry row for this diode datasheet-detail refresh.
Appended this JSONL record with mandatory per-file edit statements.

notes: Node runtime was unavailable in shell, so validation used targeted manual code inspection of modified blocks.

summary: Removed 'unique selector' phrasing and refreshed Current Family content across all part-family views using referenced datasheet positioning, strengths, and application context.

edits: Removed 'unique selector:' prefix text from diode device pill labels while preserving electrical detail values.
Added Current Family blocks to M55342, T502, T540/T541, S-311-P-829, and SGIHLP filter panels with datasheet-derived purpose, differentiators, and intended-application context.
Updated diode series Current Family text (type/summary/notes/device hint) so each diode family reflects datasheet use case and technical positioning more explicitly.
Appended a table row documenting this family-current-block refresh.
Appended this JSONL entry with mandatory per-file edit statements.

notes: Datasheet context integrated into user-facing family descriptions without changing decode keys or route behavior.

summary: Fixed Clear Filters behavior so each family clears to an unselected state and clear-button dirty styling resets to normal when fully cleared.

edits: Updated M55342 input formatting to allow blank resistance input without auto-restoring defaults so clear can produce a true empty state.
Changed clear-button dirty-state logic for M55342, T502, T54x, S311, SGIHLP, and diode families to treat fully unselected states as clean (normal color).
Updated clear handlers to set all filter fields to unselected values (including resistance input and diode series/device/quality fields).
Adjusted diode render logic to avoid auto-reselecting default device/quality after clear so the cleared state remains unselected.
Appended a summary row for the clear-filters empty-state fix.
Appended this JSONL record with mandatory file_edits details.

notes: Node runtime unavailable in shell, so validation was done by direct code-path inspection of all clear handlers and dirty-state update functions.

summary: Added M32535 capacitor family with splash routing, dedicated browser view, datasheet references, detailed code pills, and PN decode support.

edits: Added M32535 to splash family choices, PART_FAMILY_CONFIG routing, view nodes, and machine-readable PART_FAMILY_REFERENCE_DB with KEMET C1095/C1096 datasheet links.
Implemented a dedicated M32535 browser workspace with detailed pill filters for slash, characteristic, voltage, capacitance, tolerance, termination, level, and electrode fields.
Added M32535 rule logic from datasheets (E1/BP vs E2 voltage/tolerance constraints, slash-sheet termination restrictions, and capacitance-code parsing for R-format and 3-digit codes).
Added M32535 PN builder/results rendering, clear/reset wiring, clear-button state handling, and decoder integration in DECODER_REGISTRY for PN/BOM decipher paths.
Appended a summary row for the M32535 family addition.
Appended this JSONL record with mandatory per-file edit statements.

notes: Datasheet mapping based on KEMET M32535 C0G/BP and X7R ordering tables; availability table constraints are modeled at code-rule level rather than full slash-sheet row matrix in this revision.
